add_new_brand.description: Follow these steps exactly to add a new brand to the system.
steps: 1. Copy config/industries/velocx_nz.json → config/industries/{industry}.json. Fill in ALL fields — especially image_style, voice_guide, hashtags, brand_colors, and posting_schedule.
2. Copy agents/brands/velocx_nz.md → agents/brands/{industry}.md. Change the INDUSTRY value and display name.
3. Copy .github/workflows/post_velocx_nz.yml → .github/workflows/post_{industry}.yml. Replace all occurrences of 'velocx_nz' with '{industry}'.

4. Copy .github/workflows/health_velocx_nz.yml → .github/workflows/health_{industry}.yml. Replace all occurrences of 'velocx_nz' with '{industry}'. Update the cron schedule to the brand's posting time.
5. In GitHub repo → Settings → Environments → New environment. Name it '{industry}'.
6. Add these secrets to the new environment: FACEBOOK_PAGE_ID, FACEBOOK_ACCESS_TOKEN, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Add INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN, INSTAGRAM_USER_ID if using Instagram.
7. Add logo file: assets/logos/{industry}_logo.png (PNG with transparency, recommended 2000x2000).
8. Register the new brand in this file under active_brands.
9. Commit and push. The new brand is now live.
notes: Each brand has its own GitHub Environment with isolated secrets — no cross-brand credential leakage.
The path filter in each post workflow ('{industry}_*_pending.json') ensures only that brand's pending files trigger its workflow.
Posting schedules are independent — each brand's health_check workflow has its own cron.
